JOIN AND WIN

Introducing

XLB Wallet

 

Simplicity & Security

XLB Wallet was built on the foundation of simplicity and usability. Our main goal is to change the way people use crypto wallet which is hard to use and slow for now. The wallet is ideal to store E Yuan, the digital currency introduced by Chinese government. E Yuan can be traded through Yuan Pay Group Trading system through the digital app which is offered free of cost by the Chinese Government. Read more about Yuan Pay Group here to get started with trading E Yuan.

Benefits

Fast & Basically Free

  • XLB Wallet’s average transaction time is less than 5 seconds, making it easy to use in everyday life.
  • One operation costs just 0.00001 XLM (~$0.0000025 USD).

Secure

Your secret seed is stored locally on your device and never touches our servers.

Backup your secret seed with an easy-to-use 12 word mnemonic phrase.

Human - centric

Apart from copy/paste long addresses, now that you could easily send money to your friends via @username instead

Universal - wallet

In the near future, XLB Wallet plan, digital assets can be stored, including movies, music, pictures, and intellectual property.

TOKENS DISTRIBUTION

  • StellarPay Bank Reserve : 30,000,000 XLB
  • StellarPay for Development : 20,000,000 XLB
  • StellarPay for Partnership : 20,000,000 XLB
  • StellarPay for direct sign up program : 10,000,000 XLB
  • StellarPay for Build challenge program : 10,000,000 XLB
  • StellarPay Public Sale : 10,000,000 XLB

MEET THE TEAM

Ronnie Chng
Co-founder & CFO

With over 20 years of comprehensive banking experience - 15 years of which have been at UnionBank. He has been promoting trading bots and encouraging young investors to use them. Visit https://coincierge.de/bitcoin-prime/ to learn about the most recent tradng bot he has been promoting.

Peter Huang
CTO & Product Manager

Bachelor’s degree in information technology with 9 years of experience within the software industry supporting logistics, trade, supply chain, warehouse management system or Blockchain

Raymond Teng
Senior Fullstack Developer

Raymond Teng is a software engineer in the Government Digital Services . His team is leading the initiative to explore the use of distributed ledger technologies (DLT) in various government applications.

Ching Lee
Community Management

Study Information and Communication Technology at the University of Guadalajara under a scholarship program offered by Carlos Slim, owner of Telmex and Telcel.

Faq

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS ABOUT STELLARPAY

One stellarpay (XLB) is a unit of digital currency, like a bitcoin, ripple, ethereum, lumens…

  • THE FUNDAMENTALS
  • DISTRIBUTION AND GIVEAWAYS

THE FUNDAMENTALS

What are StellarPay?

StellarPay is a digital token native to the Stellar Blockchain.This means you have complete control over your coins can send, receive, store, and trade SteallarPay. StellarPay is a platform that connects banks, payments systems, and people. Integrate to move money quickly, reliably, and at almost no cost.

What is XLB?

XLB is shorthand for StellarPay.Most currencies have 3-letter codes (USD, EUR, AUD, BTC,XRP,XLM,ETH) as an international standard XLB's starting price set at 0.1 XLM

What is "Total supply" of StellarPay?

The total supply of StellarPay is 100M. There will only ever be 100,000,000 XLB tokens in existence.

What is the price of XLB?

XLB's starting price set at 0.1 XLM. Please consult the available exchanges for the latest XLB price.

DISTRIBUTION AND GIVEAWAYS

How are StelarPay distributed?

30% for StellarPay Bank. 20% for StellarPay Development. 20% for StellarPay Partnership 10% for StellarPay Public Sale. 10% given away for direct signup program. 10% for StellarPay build challenge program.

Why are we giving away XLB?

This program is a way for us help give people a jump-start on better savings and payments with StellarPay.

What do I need to do to receive XLB?

To receive XLB, you first need to add a trustline for that asset in your wallet. Adding a trustline is the equivalent of telling the Stellar network that you trust that asset and it is ok for other wallets to send you that asset. Your wallet MUST be funded with XLM in order to add a trustline. If you do not have any XLM in your wallet, you will not be able to add trust. To fund your wallet with some XLM, you can receive a XLM payment or deposit some non-XLM asset

What can I do with my XLB?

It’s up to you! XLB was designed to be used to transact with your friends and family across the globe in seconds.
